title: polystichum recurvum
intro: Polystichum recurvum, also known as the curled-leaf lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polystichum recurvum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Polystichum recurvum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties, although proper identification and dosing are essential due to its potential interactions with other medications.
